title: poa nemoralis subsp. firmula
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. firmula, also known as the meadow grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is commonly found in Europe and Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis subsp. firmula include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
